name: @garamatic/integration-tests
description: Integration test suite for all Garamatic services

scripts.test: npm run test:contracts && npm run test:services && npm run test:e2e
scripts.services:up: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.test.yml up -d ticket-masala gatekeeper-api mailhog test-receiver
scripts.validate:contracts: cd ../integration-contracts && npm run validate && npm test
